interactionPlan.concept: Understanding how binomial filters like b_{2,2} reduce checkerboard-pattern noise in images while maintaining contrast.

interactions.label: Apply Filter Iterations
interactions.teaches: Shows the effect of applying the binomial filter multiple times to reduce noise.

interactions.label: Toggle between Filters
interactions.teaches: Compares the effectiveness of the box filter vs. the binomial filter on noise removal.

interactions.label: Visualize Convolution Process
interactions.teaches: Demonstrates how each filter processes the image step-by-step.

interactions.label: Adjust Image Contrast
interactions.teaches: Allows users to see the necessity of dividing by the DC gain to maintain consistent contrast.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Initial view focused on the grid and filter matrix, with images to the side for comparison.
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure the real-time update of images when applying filters to enhance the interactive learning.

gpt-4o.notes: The visualization includes unnecessary elements and lacks meaningful interactions, but generally captures the idea of the original plot.
